business.name: Westchester Plumbing
business.description: Family-run, licensed, and trusted across the Westside. From burst pipes to full repipes, Westchester Plumbing shows up fast, explains your options honestly, and leaves your home spotless — the standard our Santa Monica and Westchester neighbors count on.
business.license: Licensed & insured · California C-36 Plumbing Contractor

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.blurb: Burst pipes, major leaks, no hot water — fast Westside response, often same day.

services.title: Drain & Sewer Cleaning
services.blurb: Clogs, slow drains, and sewer backups cleared with camera diagnostics and hydro-jetting.

services.title: Water Heaters
services.blurb: Tank and tankless water heaters — installed, repaired, and replaced, sized right for your home.

services.title: Repiping & Remodels
services.blurb: Whole-home repipes and clean rough-ins for kitchen and bathroom remodels.

services.title: Fixtures & Faucets
services.blurb: Faucets, toilets, garbage disposals, and water filtration, installed right the first time.

services.title: Leak Detection & Maintenance
services.blurb: Leak detection and preventative tune-ups that catch small problems before they flood.

items.author: James Palmer
items.body: Technician arrived within 45 minutes of my call. Replaced the kitchen faucet in practically no time. Left the place immaculate. I highly recommend Westchester Plumbing to all.

items.author: Domingo Rivera
items.body: We have called numerous times when we had an urgent need and thus far they come through. They take the time to explain the problem so that you can weigh your options. They are reliable, friendly, and honest.

items.author: Cindy Lang
items.body: This company is amazing! So professional and great work — had all my pipes replaced!

process.title: Call or request
process.body: Tell us what's going on. You'll get a real arrival window and a straight answer — no runaround, no call center.

process.title: Upfront estimate
process.body: We diagnose on-site and quote the full price before any work begins. You approve it first. No surprises on the invoice.

process.title: Clean, careful work
process.body: Licensed plumbers, drop cloths down, shoes covered. We treat your home like ours and leave it cleaner than we found it.

process.title: Stand behind it
process.body: Every repair is guaranteed in writing. If something isn't right, we come back and make it right — no argument.

faq.a: Yes — we answer calls for burst pipes, major leaks, and no-hot-water emergencies across the Westside, often with same-day response.
Yes. Westchester Plumbing is a licensed California C-36 plumbing contractor and fully insured — happy to show proof on request.
Westchester, Santa Monica, Playa del Rey, Playa Vista, Marina del Rey, Venice, Mar Vista, Culver City, and nearby Westside communities.
We'll always quote the full price before any work begins, so you approve it first — no surprises on the invoice.
Every job is backed by our workmanship guarantee, on top of the manufacturer warranties on the parts and fixtures we install.

faq.q: How fast can you get here?
faq.a: For urgent jobs we aim to be on-site fast — often within the hour. Call (310) 568-8648 for the next available window.

paragraphs: Westchester Plumbing has built its name the hard way — one honest job at a time. Neighbors across Santa Monica and the Westside call us back because we show up fast, do the work right, and respect their homes.

When you call, you get a real plumber — often on-site within the hour for urgent work. We find the actual problem, explain your options in plain language, and quote the price before we start. No upsells, no surprises.
From a single kitchen faucet to a whole-home repipe, we leave every job cleaner than we found it. That's why so much of our work comes from repeat customers and word-of-mouth referrals.
